description_long: This is a raised performance stage with a dark platform, flanked by two sets of stairs on either side and surrounded by a low metal railing at the front. The stage is equipped with a full drum kit, amplifiers, and speakers, suggesting it is set up for a live music performance. Four tall lighting rigs with square lights are positioned at the corners, providing illumination for the performers. The platform is elevated above a light-colored base, and the rear of the stage features large speaker stacks and additional sound equipment. The surface of the stage is flat and spacious, allowing for multiple performers and equipment. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for concerts or public events in urban parks or plazas.
description: A modern, elevated concert stage with stairs, railings, lighting rigs, and a full drum kit setup, designed for live performances. The stage features amplifiers, speakers, and a spacious platform for musicians.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main stage area, stairs, railings, drum kit, amplifiers, and lighting rigs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stage, the stairs, and the arrangement of the drum kit and lighting rigs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large speaker stacks, drum kit from behind, and the back of the stage platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stairs, railing, and the side profile of the drum kit and lighting rigs.
